properties.sql:
WITH apps AS (
         SELECT lower(c_district) AS d, count(*) AS total,
                count(*) FILTER (WHERE c_status IN ('approved','auto_approved')) AS approved
         FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 WHERE c_district IS NOT NULL AND c_district != ''
         GROUP BY d
       ),
       parcs AS (
         SELECT lower(c_district) AS d, count(*) AS n
         FROM app_fd_parcellocation WHERE c_district IS NOT NULL AND c_district != ''
         GROUP BY d
       ),
       farms AS (
         SELECT lower(c_district) AS d, count(DISTINCT c_national_id) AS n
         FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 WHERE c_district IS NOT NULL AND c_district != ''
         GROUP BY d
       ),
       vchs AS (
         SELECT lower(a.c_district) AS d, count(*) AS n
         FROM app_fd_im_voucher v LEFT JOIN app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a ON a.id = v.c_application_id
         WHERE v.c_status='redeemed' AND a.c_district IS NOT NULL
         GROUP BY d
       ),
       all_d AS (
         SELECT unnest(ARRAY['butha_buthe','leribe','mokhotlong','berea','thaba_tseka','maseru','mafeteng','qachas_nek','mohales_hoek','quthing']) AS code
       )
       SELECT all_d.code AS district,
              COALESCE(apps.total, 0)::text     AS applications_total,
              COALESCE(apps.approved, 0)::text  AS applications_approved,
              CASE WHEN COALESCE(apps.total,0) > 0
                   THEN ROUND(apps.approved::numeric / apps.total * 100, 1)::text
                   ELSE '0' END                  AS approval_rate,
              COALESCE(parcs.n, 0)::text        AS parcels,
              COALESCE(farms.n, 0)::text        AS farmers,
              COALESCE(vchs.n, 0)::text         AS vouchers_redeemed
       FROM all_d
       LEFT JOIN apps  ON all_d.code = apps.d
       LEFT JOIN parcs ON all_d.code = parcs.d
       LEFT JOIN farms ON all_d.code = farms.d
       LEFT JOIN vchs  ON all_d.code = vchs.d
       ORDER BY all_d.code
